## Summary

Describe the improvement you would like to see.

## Motivation

Why would this change be useful?

## Proposed Idea

Explain the preferred behavior, workflow, or UI change.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, screenshots, or other references here.
